angular_behavior: Browser tab title is AdminDashboard (matches src/index.html).
react_behavior: Browser tab title is Admin Dashboard (React) and does not match Angular title string.

test_name: login page uses React layout classes not Angular main-container/login-container
angular_behavior: Login view is wrapped with .main-container and PrimeNG card uses .login-container.
react_behavior: Login view uses .login-main-container and .login-card; Angular wrapper selectors are absent.

test_name: admin shell uses app-container and app-content not Angular container/content
angular_behavior: Main layout uses .container with main outlet in .content per app shell.
react_behavior: Main layout uses .app-container and .app-content; Angular .container > .content is absent.

test_name: 404 page does not use Angular's .container > .error-container structure
react_behavior: 404 view uses .error-page-container and does not use Angular's div.container >> .error-container structure.

test_name: 404 Go to Homepage is not a plain anchor.p-button (uses button inside link)
angular_behavior: Go to Homepage is a single anchor with class p-button (PrimeNG routerLink pattern).
react_behavior: Go to Homepage is a PrimeReact Button wrapped by a React Router Link (no anchor.p-button element).

test_name: root mount element is #root not Angular app-root
angular_behavior: Application bootstraps under custom element app-root.
react_behavior: Application bootstraps under div#root; app-root element is absent.

test_name: payment orders list uses GET through React origin (proxied path)
angular_behavior: Browser issues GET to absolute http://localhost:3000/paymentOrders.
react_behavior: Browser issues GET to the React origin URL path http://127.0.0.1:4173/paymentOrders (Vite proxy) rather than direct localhost:3000.

test_name: payment order detail uses locale date strings instead of Angular date pipe
angular_behavior: Created On and Paid On render with Angular date pipe style (e.g. Jun 15 2024).
react_behavior: Same timestamps render with ECMAScript toLocaleDateString (locale-specific numeric style) and do not show the Angular pipe strings.

test_name: index does not reference favicon.ico like Angular
angular_behavior: Document head includes link rel=icon href=favicon.ico.
react_behavior: No link rel=icon href=favicon.ico in the served React index document.
